string.text: {=TWzBmjiP}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=z2yr4mc6}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. a noble clan of the Golden Horde.
{=GxetCE5D}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has stood in the Imperial Court and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the Golden Horde.

{=GmCZANBG}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the Golden Horde.
{=a8584KD0}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. the most ancient and noble of the Mongolian tribes.

{=Y8rYJaOa}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. one of the most illustrious families in the annals of the Golden Horde. The Christians we have slain, and the glory we have won, is second to none.
